<!--
Thanks for contributing to DZDocs!
Keep PRs focused — one page or one topic is easier to review than a sprawling change.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- A short summary. Which page(s) did you add or edit, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New page
- [ ] Filled in / expanded a stub
- [ ] Correction or clarification to an existing page
- [ ] Theming / site / tooling change
- [ ] Other (describe above)

## Checklist

- [ ] Content is **accurate** to the best of my knowledge (and I've flagged anything I'm unsure about).
- [ ] Each new/edited page has frontmatter with a `title` and a one-line `description`.
- [ ] Links and cross-references work (I previewed locally, or I've double-checked them).
- [ ] No EULA-violating content (no de-binarization / DeODOL workflows).
- [ ] Only **original or vanilla** assets — no redistributed models, RVMATs, or textures from other mods.

## Anything you're unsure about?

<!-- Optional. Flagging uncertainty helps reviewers help you. -->
